name: mobicom-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM MobiCom submissions: SIGMOBILE wireless/mobile-networking venue fit, the twice-a-year rolling-deadline calendar with two-round review and rebuttal, the retained one-shot revision path, HotCRP double-blind submission audits, real-testbed and RF/energy evaluation rigor, ACM artifact badges, and double-column camera-ready. Grounded in the MobiCom 2026 and 2027-cycle official pages checked on 2026-07-09.
